title: little home
description: Generates a small house to live in.
body:
This mod introduces small, procedurally generated houses into the world of Minecraft. Each house comes with a small farm, making it a perfect starting point for beginners. These houses provide a safe haven from the dangers of the night and a place to cultivate your first crops, accelerating your progress in the early game.


To locate these houses, use the locate command with the id:priv . Please note that this mod requires the installation of Forge to function properly. At this time, there are no customization options available for the houses or farms generated by this mod. The aim is to keep things simple and convenient for players, particularly those who are new to the Minecraft experience.


Enjoy a new level of comfort and convenience in your Minecraft adventures with this mod, and never worry about finding a safe place to stay on your first night again!
